nhmj.configuration.title: NeoHotModInjector Configs
nhmj.configuration.mixinTransformMode.to:
The transform mode for Injector.
When the TRAMPOLINE mode is selected,the transformed class bytes by mixin will be transformed again by MixinHotSwap to fit the arguments of Instrumentation::redefineClasses.
When the NATIVE mode is selected,HotModInjectorMod will use MinHook to across the VMFlag restrictions and set AllowEnhancedClassRedefinition to true runtime.
WARN: The NATIVE mode is dangerous and only suit for Windows x64 with JetBrainsRuntime 21.0.11+1-b1163.116.
nhmj.configuration.mixinTransformPools.t:
Number of threads used for parallel mixin class transformation.
Set to 1 for sequential processing. Higher values speed up injection of mods with many mixins.
nhmj.configuration.confirm_screen.toolti: When it's true and there's BetterModList in the ModList,it will show a confirm screen.
